trans-unit.source: Basemaps
trans-unit.target: Basemaps

trans-unit.source: Base maps in QGIS serve as foundational layers that provide essential geographical context for other spatial data layers. They typically include features like roads, rivers, administrative boundaries, terrain information, and in some cases, satellite imagery. The primary purpose of base maps is to offer a visual reference for spatial analysis, data visualization, and map creation within QGIS projects.
trans-unit.target: Base maps in QGIS serve as foundational layers that provide essential geographical context for other spatial data layers. They typically include features like roads, rivers, administrative boundaries, terrain information, and in some cases, satellite imagery. The primary purpose of base maps is to offer a visual reference for spatial analysis, data visualization, and map creation within QGIS projects.

trans-unit.source: Advantages of using base maps in QGIS, including satellite imagery, include:
trans-unit.target: Advantages of using base maps in QGIS, including satellite imagery, include:

trans-unit.source: Contextual Reference: Base maps offer a backdrop against which other spatial data layers can be overlaid, providing users with valuable context for their analyses and visualizations.
trans-unit.target: Contextual Reference: Base maps offer a backdrop against which other spatial data layers can be overlaid, providing users with valuable context for their analyses and visualizations.

trans-unit.source: Enhanced Visualization: Incorporating satellite imagery as base maps adds an extra layer of detail and realism to maps created in QGIS. Satellite imagery provides high-resolution views of the Earth's surface, enabling users to visualize features such as land cover, vegetation, and urban areas with precision.
trans-unit.target: Enhanced Visualization: Incorporating satellite imagery as base maps adds an extra layer of detail and realism to maps created in QGIS. Satellite imagery provides high-resolution views of the Earth's surface, enabling users to visualize features such as land cover, vegetation, and urban areas with precision.

trans-unit.source: Quick Project Setup: Incorporating pre-existing base maps, including satellite imagery, into QGIS projects allows users to quickly set up new projects without the need to digitise or create base layers from scratch.
trans-unit.target: Quick Project Setup: Incorporating pre-existing base maps, including satellite imagery, into QGIS projects allows users to quickly set up new projects without the need to digitise or create base layers from scratch.

trans-unit.source: Limitations of base maps, including satellite imagery, in QGIS may include:
trans-unit.target: Limitations of base maps, including satellite imagery, in QGIS may include:

trans-unit.source: Limited Detail: While satellite imagery provides high-resolution views of the Earth's surface, it may not capture certain features or details visible in other types of base maps, such as topographic or thematic maps.
trans-unit.target: Limited Detail: While satellite imagery provides high-resolution views of the Earth's surface, it may not capture certain features or details visible in other types of base maps, such as topographic or thematic maps.

trans-unit.source: Data Accuracy: Depending on the source of the satellite imagery, there may be variations in data accuracy, completeness, or currency, which can affect the reliability of analyses or visualizations.
trans-unit.target: Data Accuracy: Depending on the source of the satellite imagery, there may be variations in data accuracy, completeness, or currency, which can affect the reliability of analyses or visualizations.

trans-unit.source: Dependency on Internet Connectivity: Some satellite imagery base maps, particularly those sourced from online mapping services, require an active internet connection to access and may not be available offline.
trans-unit.target: Dependency on Internet Connectivity: Some satellite imagery base maps, particularly those sourced from online mapping services, require an active internet connection to access and may not be available offline.

trans-unit.source: Overall, base maps, including satellite imagery, play a crucial role in QGIS projects by providing a foundational layer of geographic context and visual reference. Users should leverage the advantages of satellite imagery while being mindful of its limitations and considering complementary data sources for comprehensive analyses and visualizations.
trans-unit.target: Overall, base maps, including satellite imagery, play a crucial role in QGIS projects by providing a foundational layer of geographic context and visual reference. Users should leverage the advantages of satellite imagery while being mindful of its limitations and considering complementary data sources for comprehensive analyses and visualizations.

trans-unit.source: The following section will provide an overview on how to access and add basemaps to your QGIS-project.
trans-unit.target: The following section will provide an overview on how to access and add basemaps to your QGIS-project.

trans-unit.source: Standard QGIS Basemaps
trans-unit.target: Standard QGIS Basemaps

trans-unit.source: You can always add the standard OpenStreetMap as a basemap to your map canvas.
trans-unit.target: You can always add the standard OpenStreetMap as a basemap to your map canvas.

trans-unit.source: The [wiki article on basemaps](content/wiki/en_qgis_basemaps_wiki.md), has a tutorial on adding more types of basemaps (e.g. from Google Maps) to the standard basemap options in QGIS.
trans-unit.target: The [wiki article on basemaps](content/wiki/en_qgis_basemaps_wiki.md), has a tutorial on adding more types of basemaps (e.g. from Google Maps) to the standard basemap options in QGIS.

trans-unit.source: There are two ways to add OpenStreetMap as a basemap:
trans-unit.target: There are two ways to add OpenStreetMap as a basemap:

trans-unit.source: Find in the `Browser` panel `XYZ Tiles`. Open the dropdown by clicking on the arrow next to it and select OpenStreetMap.
trans-unit.target: Find in the `Browser` panel `XYZ Tiles`. Open the dropdown by clicking on the arrow next to it and select OpenStreetMap.

trans-unit.source: In the `Layer` menu → `Add Layer` → `Add XYZ layer...` → Select OpenStreetMap.
trans-unit.target: In the `Layer` menu → `Add Layer` → `Add XYZ layer...` → Select OpenStreetMap.

trans-unit.source: QuickMapServices
trans-unit.target: QuickMapServices

trans-unit.source: There are lots of plugins available for QGIS that provide additional tools not available in a standard installation. The [article on plugins](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_plugins_wiki.md) in the wiki provides more detailed example information. One useful plugin is [QuickMapServices](https://nextgis.com/blog/quickmapservices/). This plugin lets you access a wide range of basemaps that are not available in QGIS by default, such as Bing or Sentinel-2 satellite imagery.
trans-unit.target: There are lots of plugins available for QGIS that provide additional tools not available in a standard installation. The [article on plugins](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_plugins_wiki.md) in the wiki provides more detailed example information. One useful plugin is [QuickMapServices](https://nextgis.com/blog/quickmapservices/). This plugin lets you access a wide range of basemaps that are not available in QGIS by default, such as Bing or Sentinel-2 satellite imagery.

trans-unit.source: ::::{dropdown} Installation of plugins
trans-unit.target: ::::{dropdown} Installation of plugins

trans-unit.source: To [install a plugin](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_plugins_wiki.html), in the top bar, navigate to `Plugins` → `Manage and Install Plugins…` → `All` → Search for the plugin → `Install Plugin`.
trans-unit.target: To [install a plugin](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_plugins_wiki.html), in the top bar, navigate to `Plugins` → `Manage and Install Plugins…` → `All` → Search for the plugin → `Install Plugin`.

trans-unit.source: If you cannot find a specific extension, check that you have not used spaces in the plugin name where they don't belong (e.g., when looking for QuickMapServices, searching “Quick Map” will not return results, but “quickmap” will). You can use an asterisk (`*`) as a wildcard in searches (so "quick*map" will return results with or without a space between "quick" and "map").
trans-unit.target: If you cannot find a specific extension, check that you have not used spaces in the plugin name where they don't belong (e.g., when looking for QuickMapServices, searching “Quick Map” will not return results, but “quickmap” will). You can use an asterisk (`*`) as a wildcard in searches (so "quick*map" will return results with or without a space between "quick" and "map").

trans-unit.source: If you still cannot find an extension, you may need to allow experimental extensions in the options (see below).
trans-unit.target: If you still cannot find an extension, you may need to allow experimental extensions in the options (see below).

trans-unit.source: name: en_30.30.2_plugin_installation_experimental_checkbox width 400 px
trans-unit.target: name: en_30.30.2_plugin_installation_experimental_checkbox width 400 px

trans-unit.source: Plugin Manager settings to show experimental plugins. :::
trans-unit.target: Plugin Manager settings to show experimental plugins. :::

trans-unit.source: To add a basemap from the QuickMapServices plugin:
trans-unit.target: To add a basemap from the QuickMapServices plugin:

trans-unit.source: In the main menu in the top bar of your screen, navigate to `Web` → `QuickMapServices`.
trans-unit.target: In the main menu in the top bar of your screen, navigate to `Web` → `QuickMapServices`.

trans-unit.source: Click on `Search QMS`. A new panel will open, most likely at the bottom right.
trans-unit.target: Click on `Search QMS`. A new panel will open, most likely at the bottom right.

trans-unit.source: Here, you can search for a basemap of your choice. For example, Bing Aerial, different versions of OpenStreetMap, Sentinel-2 satellite imagery.
trans-unit.target: Here, you can search for a basemap of your choice. For example, Bing Aerial, different versions of OpenStreetMap, Sentinel-2 satellite imagery.

trans-unit.source: A list of basemaps and useful search queries for the QMS-plugin can be found on [this website](https://qms.nextgis.com). This link can also be found in the "About" section of the QMS-plugin.
trans-unit.target: A list of basemaps and useful search queries for the QMS-plugin can be found on [this website](https://qms.nextgis.com). This link can also be found in the "About" section of the QMS-plugin.

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} Video: Functionality of the QuickMapServices Plugin__
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} Video: Functionality of the QuickMapServices Plugin__

trans-unit.source: When you are using QuickMapServices, be aware that some of these maps are under copyright laws that restrict the reproduction of these maps. Be aware of these restrictions by looking up the copyright licenses for the basemaps you are using. In general, satellite imagery is not free to use. This means you can not publish maps with all of the available base maps!
trans-unit.target: When you are using QuickMapServices, be aware that some of these maps are under copyright laws that restrict the reproduction of these maps. Be aware of these restrictions by looking up the copyright licenses for the basemaps you are using. In general, satellite imagery is not free to use. This means you can not publish maps with all of the available base maps!

trans-unit.source: Self-Assessment Questions
trans-unit.target: Self-Assessment Questions

trans-unit.source: ::::{admonition} Check your skills :class: note
trans-unit.target: ::::{admonition} Check your skills :class: note

trans-unit.source: Check whether you know the key concepts from this chapter by answering the questions below.
trans-unit.target: Check whether you know the key concepts from this chapter by answering the questions below.

trans-unit.source: __What is a basemap, and why is it useful in GIS projects?__
trans-unit.target: __What is a basemap, and why is it useful in GIS projects?__

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} Answer A basemap is a foundational or background map layer that provides geographic context (e.g. roads, rivers, terrain, satellite imagery, administrative boundaries) over which you overlay your thematic or analytical data. It is useful because it helps users orient themselves geographically, provides visual reference and spatial context (for example, seeing how your data sit relative to roads, cities, water bodies), and speeds up setting and delivering projects and maps. :::
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} Answer A basemap is a foundational or background map layer that provides geographic context (e.g. roads, rivers, terrain, satellite imagery, administrative boundaries) over which you overlay your thematic or analytical data. It is useful because it helps users orient themselves geographically, provides visual reference and spatial context (for example, seeing how your data sit relative to roads, cities, water bodies), and speeds up setting and delivering projects and maps. :::

trans-unit.source: __How do you add a basemap to QGIS? Describe at least one method (plugin, XYZ tiles, etc.).__
trans-unit.target: __How do you add a basemap to QGIS? Describe at least one method (plugin, XYZ tiles, etc.).__

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} Answer
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} Answer

trans-unit.source: In the `Browser`-panel, expand the "*XYZ Tiles*" group and select a service such as OpenStreetMap.
trans-unit.target: In the `Browser`-panel, expand the "*XYZ Tiles*" group and select a service such as OpenStreetMap.

trans-unit.source: Alternatively, [install the QuickMapServices plugin](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Module_2/en_qgis_basemap.html#quickmapservices) and use it to add a map. :::
trans-unit.target: Alternatively, [install the QuickMapServices plugin](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Module_2/en_qgis_basemap.html#quickmapservices) and use it to add a map. :::

trans-unit.source: __What are attribution requirements, and how should you handle them when using basemaps from third‑party providers?__
trans-unit.target: __What are attribution requirements, and how should you handle them when using basemaps from third‑party providers?__

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} Answer
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} Answer

trans-unit.source: __Attribution requirements__ are obligations set by the data provider or map service regarding how you must credit (acknowledge) their work when you use their basemaps. This may include displaying a copyright notice, data source name, or logo on your map or in your project.
trans-unit.target: __Attribution requirements__ are obligations set by the data provider or map service regarding how you must credit (acknowledge) their work when you use their basemaps. This may include displaying a copyright notice, data source name, or logo on your map or in your project.

trans-unit.source: Many basemap or satellite imagery services are under copyright or restrictive licenses, meaning you cannot freely reproduce or publish maps using them without following the licensing rules.
trans-unit.target: Many basemap or satellite imagery services are under copyright or restrictive licenses, meaning you cannot freely reproduce or publish maps using them without following the licensing rules.

trans-unit.source: To handle attribution properly:
trans-unit.target: To handle attribution properly:

trans-unit.source: Check the terms of service or license of the basemap provider before using their tiles.
trans-unit.target: Check the terms of service or license of the basemap provider before using their tiles.

trans-unit.source: Include the required attribution somewhere visible on your map. For example, when using OpenStreeMap basemaps, make sure you include the attribution "© OpenStreetMap contributors" somewhere on your map. If that is done, you can freely distribute and publish the map. :::
trans-unit.target: Include the required attribution somewhere visible on your map. For example, when using OpenStreeMap basemaps, make sure you include the attribution "© OpenStreetMap contributors" somewhere on your map. If that is done, you can freely distribute and publish the map. :::
